summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are classified conservatively as independent backlog items for maintainer review/proof/repair outside this cluster; the already-closed PR is kept closed; refs missing from the preflight artifact require targeted re-hydration before classification.
